Standard Racial Traits

  • Ability Score Modifiers: Hephaestans naturally understand the building blocks of the universe but are frail and socially inept. They gain +4 Intelligence, +2 Wisdom, and –2 Constitution, -2 Charisma.
  • Type: Hephaestans are Humanoids with the elf subtype.
  • Size: Hephaestans are Medium creatures and thus receive no bonuses or penalties due to their size.
  • Base Speed: Hephaestans have a base speed of 30 feet.
  • Languages: Hephaestans begin play speaking Common and Elven. Hephaestans with high Intelligence scores can choose any language. See the Linguistics skill page for more information about these languages.

Defense Racial Traits

  • Mental Barrier: Hephaestans gain a +2 racial saving throw bonus against mind affecting abilities.

Feat and Skill Racial Traits

  • Dungeoneering expert: Just by looking at a creature Hephaestans can quickly understand their biology, giving them a +2 racial bonus on knowledge checks to identify a creature.

Offensive Racial Traits

  • Nerve Pinch: Hephaestans understand the biology of most creatures they encounter quickly identifying their weak points. Hephaestan may attempt a nerve Pinch as a standard action against creatures that have been identified. By succeeding a melee touch attack they may attempt to non-lethally knockout a creature (DC 10 + half the Hephaestan Hit dice + Strength modifier) if a creature fails their save, they are rendered unconscious for 1 minute, even on a successful save a creature is staggered for 1 round. This ability can only affect a creature once a day and only on creatures that are no more than size category larger than the Hephaestan. Creatures immune to precision damage are immune to this ability.

Senses Racial Traits

  • Low-Light Vision: Hephaestans can see twice as far as humans in conditions of dim light.
